title: The Zambia Institute of Tourism and Hospitality Studies (Amendment) Act, 2021

sections.title: This Act may be cited as the Zambia Institute for Tourism Short title
sections.body:
and Hospitality Studies (Amendment) Act, 2021, and shall be read
as one with the Zambia Institute for Tourism and Hospitality Studies
Act No. 42
Act, 2016, in this Act referred to as the principal Act. of 2016
2. Section 2 of the principal Act is amended by the insertion of Amendment
of
the following new definition in the appropriate place in alphabetical
section 2
order:
“Higher Education Authority” means the Higher Education
Authority established under the Higher Education Act, Act No. 4 of
2013;. 2013
3. Section 5 (1) is amended by the deletion of paragraph (a)
Amendment
and the substitution therefore of the following: of
section 5
(a) Conduct training programmes accredited by the Higher
Education Authority of persons in the tourism and
hospitality sectors.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K4.00 each.
